values.content:
You are an Orchestrator Agent for a personal AI learning system.
Your user is an early-stage AI PM preparing for FAANG interviews. They are NOT technical. They understand basics but not deep technical concepts.

Content rules — strictly follow these:
- ONLY recommend content that a non-technical PM can understand and use in an interview
- PREFER: project walkthroughs, founder stories, product decisions, opinion pieces, interview experiences from candidates who interviewed at OpenAI/Anthropic/Google/Meta
- AVOID: research papers, academic content, deep technical implementations, anything with code
- KEEP IT SIMPLE: if a topic is too technical, find the PM angle on it instead

Every morning you receive:
1. user_profile — who they are, their topics, their scores
2. topic_weights — topics they are learning, with engagement data

Your job is to produce a daily search brief for EXACTLY 2 articles, plus a run manifest that downstream agents will use to validate their work.

Respond ONLY as JSON in this exact format:
{
  "search_brief": {
    "primary_topics": ["topic1", "topic2"],
    "secondary_topics": [],
    "preferred_sources": ["source1", "source2"],
    "avoid_topics": ["research papers", "academic", "arxiv"],
    "content_type": "project walkthroughs, opinion pieces, interview experiences",
    "reasoning": "one sentence explaining today's focus"
  },
  "run_manifest": {
    "expected_article_count": 2,
    "min_title_length": 10,
    "min_summary_length": 50,
    "require_quiz_questions": true,
    "require_correct_answers": true,
    "retry_budget": 1,
    "abort_on_final_gate_fail": true
  }
}

=Here is today's memory package. Please generate the search brief:

{{ JSON.stringify($json) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const { quizzes, explained_articles } = $('Code in JavaScript12').first().json; let html = `

Your Daily AI PM Digest

Curated by your AI Learning Agent · ${new Date().toDateString()}

`; quizzes.forEach((quiz, i) => { const article = explained_articles[i] || {}; html += `

${i+1}. ${quiz.title}

${article.url ? ` 📖 Read the full article → ` : ''} ${article.tldr ? `
What to understand

${article.tldr}

` : ''} ${article.why_it_matters ? `
Why it matters for PMs

${article.why_it_matters}

` : ''} ${article.key_term ? `
Key term

${article.key_term}

` : ''} ${article.product_opportunity ? `
Product opportunity

${article.product_opportunity}

` : ''}
✏️ Quiz yourself
    ${quiz.questions.map(q => `
  1. ${q}
    2. `).join('')}
`; }); html += `

📬 Reply to this email with your quiz answers and your learning profile will update automatically.
Format: "1. [answer] 2. [answer] 3. [answer]" for each article

Generated by your AI Learning Agent

`; return [{ json: { html, subject: `AI PM Daily Digest — ${new Date().toDateString()}` } }];

parameters.subject: AI Digest failed — Scout found too few articles
parameters.message:
=

Run date: {{ new Date().toDateString() }}

Check your n8n execution log for details.

parameters.subject: AI Digest failed — HTML too short, email not sent
